CompanyProfile.noProfileDesc: Submit your company documentation to generate a comprehensive health and readiness profile.

Landing.heroTitle: From 6 Weeks of Consulting to 10 Minutes of AI.
Landing.heroSubtext: EuroGrant AI turns complex EU grant discovery and proposal drafting into a seamless automated workflow. Designed for growth-stage SMEs to secure funding without the agency retainer.
Landing.workflowSubtext: Automate your funding strategy. Our AI engine profiles your company, scouts opportunities, and drafts complex technical proposals.
Landing.feature1Desc: Securely upload your pitch decks, financial statements, and technical specs. Our AI automatically builds a comprehensive Pinecone-backed company profile.
Landing.feature2Desc: We continuously index live grants from official EU portals (TED, Horizon). Get alerted instantly when a high-probability match is found.
Landing.feature3Desc: Generate complete, 10-20 page compliance-ready proposals tailored to the grant's exact scoring criteria using our advanced RAG pipeline.
Landing.footerTagline: Empowering SMEs to navigate the EU grant landscape with intelligent automation and precision.

Error.title: System Breach / Critical Failure
Error.description: The application has encountered an unexpected protocol breach. System diagnostic indicates a critical exception.
Error.fallback: An unexpected application error occurred. Secure terminal state preserved.
